runtime_owned_skills.do: Harness-level Do is owned by the Pi runtime extension command, not distributed as a normal skill.
runtime_owned_skills.done: Done is a Pi runtime completion outcome, not a normal skill.
runtime_owned_skills.escalate: Escalation is a Pi runtime blocker outcome, not a normal skill.

extension_wrappers.auto: Provided by /manifest-auto, which runs the manifest-dev lifecycle through the Pi Harness-level Do outcome gate.
extension_wrappers.babysit-pr: Provided by /manifest-babysit-pr, which synthesizes PR lifecycle grounding and runs it through the Pi Harness-level Do outcome gate.

agents_excluded._note: Pi packages do not declare a package-level `agents` resource, so no reviewer/verifier agents ship as dist/pi assets. Verifier sessions are steered at runtime by the source-owned extension via each manifest gate's verify.prompt block; agent prompt assets remain extension-private and source-owned.

commands.manifest-do: Pi Harness-level Do entrypoint for an existing manifest.
commands.manifest-auto: Pi wrapper for autonomous figure-out -> define -> Harness-level Do.
commands.manifest-babysit-pr: Pi wrapper for PR lifecycle manifest synthesis and Harness-level Do.

runtime_internal.verification: Runtime-owned verifier fanout over manifest Acceptance Criteria and Global Invariants; not exposed as an executor-callable tool.
runtime_internal.outcome: Runtime-owned done and blocker outcomes after verifier fanout; not exposed as an executor-callable tool.

runtime_dependencies.@gotgenes/pi-subagents: Required for clean verifier subagent sessions.
